titleStmt.title: SII 34.51: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 51. Tiruvaigāvūr, Papanasam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Bilvanātēśvara temple

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman [mistake for Rājakēsarivarman] Kulōttuṅga I, 40th year = A.D. 1110.

Records that a Pūṇḍi-uḍaiyāṉ Sūriyaṉ Pavaḻakkuṉṟaṉār alias Vaṉṉāḍuḍaiyār rebuilt in stone the old brick temple of Tiruvaigāvuḍaiya-Mahādēva in Aṇḍāṭṭu-kūṟṟam in Uyyakkoṇḍachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. He hailed from Paravaichchuṟṟu-Pūṇḍi in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu. He also added, with the king's permission, to the dēvadāna of the temple by a gift of land in Kaḷappākuḍi in Viṟai-kūṟṟam, a unit of Ulaguyyavandachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. The additional land measured 20 and odd vēli, yielding 1200 and odd kalam of paddy.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta muṭicūṭi mīnavar nilai keṭa villavar kulai
tara Ēṉaimaṉnavar Iḻiyaluṟ ṟiḻitarat tikkaṉaittun taṉ cakkara naṭātti vīrasiṅṅācaṉattu Avaṉi muḻutuṭaiyāḷōṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kōppa
rakēcari paṟmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulōttuṅkacōḻa tēvaṟkku yāṇṭu nāṟpatāvatu rājarājavaḷa nāṭṭup paravaiccuṟṟup
pūṇṭip pūṇṭiuṭaiyāṉ cūriyan pavaḻakkuṉṟiṉārāna vaṉṉāṭuṭaiyār Ulakuyyavanta cōḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Aṇṭāṭṭuk kūṟṟattu Uṭaiyār tiruvaikāvuṭai
ya mahādevar kōyil muṉpu Iṣṭikaiyāy jīnnittamaiyil Ikkōyil Iḻiccit tirukaṟṟaḷiyāka ceykaiku yāṇṭu muppattiraṇṭāva
tu viṇṇappañceytu Iṣṭikai Iḻiccivittu tirukkaṟṟaḷiyum tiruviṭaikkaṭṭum tirumaṇṭapamum ceyvittu Ittēvar paḻantēvatānamā
na nilattu nellut tiruppaṭimāṟṟukkum nimantattukkum pōtāmaiyil tēvatānam peṟukaikku viṇṇappañ ceytu Ulakuya vanta cōḻavaḷa
nāṭṭu viṟaikkūṟṟattu kaḷappākkuṭi pottakappaṭi nilam Irupatē cinnattāl nellu Āyirattu Irunūṟṟuc cinnamum tēvatānamā
ka Iṭuvittu nivantañcella paṇṇuvittār rājarājavaḷanāṭṭup paravaiccuṟṟup pūṇṭi pūṇṭi Uṭaiyār cūriyaṉ pavaḻakkuṉṟiṉārā
na vaṉṉāṭuṭaiyār Ivar colla Ittiruppaṇi ceyvittār Ikkōyilil śrīmāyēśvarar tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyān tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā
ṉāṉa tantai viratamuṭittārḥ—
Digital edition of SII 34.51 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
